description:
SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS,
Android and desktop apps 📱!

Unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX has no identifiers assigned to the users - it does not use phone
numbers (like Signal or WhatsApp), domain-based addresses (like email, XMPP or Matrix), usernames (like Telegram),
public keys or even random numbers (like all other messengers) to identify its users - we do not even know how many
people use SimpleX.
New in v6.4.2:
- manually accept member contact requests, with option to auto-accept.
- ignore contact requests from blocked group members.
- markdown (links etc.) in profile bio/group purpose.
- Linux app builds for aarch64 CPUs
The GitHub release build is independently reproduced by:
─────────────────┬────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────
Verifier         │Signature           │PGP key to verify
─────────────────┼────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────
SimpleX Chat team│_sha256sums.asc     │FB44AF81A45BDE327319797C85107E357D4A17FC
─────────────────┴────────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────────────────
Huge thanks to Flux for providing their servers via the app!
Commits:
- flatpak: update metainfo (#6125)
- core: prohibit connecting via direct message for blocked members (#6124)
- blog: v6.4.1 announcement (#6128)
- blog: missing preview file
- blog: correction
- rfc: group message and profile signing in chat protocol (#5835)
- docs: super-peer groups MVP rfc (#5625)
- directory bot: use short links, command /link to upgrade group link (#6130)
- core: allow to manually accept member contact requests (#6129)
- ui: add swipe/menu actions to member contact requests (#6138)
- android, desktop: fix banner not showing when creating chat with member; when creating group (#6139)
- android, desktop: gaurd crashes when item is absent in the list (#6140)
- core: set via_group_link_uri for groups (#6137)
- directory bot: fix group ID for short link upgrade (#6134)
- desktop: prepare linux aarch64 (#6107)
- core: 6.4.2.0 (simplexmq 6.4.2.0)
- ios: export localizations
- ui: translations (#6143)
- website: translations (#6144)
- ui: ru translations (#6145)
- ui: use markdown when showing profile bio and group purpose (#6126)
- tests: fix type (#6146)
- core: forward compatible format encoding (for remote desktop) (#6147)
- core: 6.4.2.1
- 6.4.2: ios 293, android 309, desktop 115
